# MCP Tool Schema Reference

Generated by `cargo xtask schemas mcp`.

Axon exposes one MCP tool (`axon`) with an `action`/`subaction`-routed input. This table is generated from this repo's `xtask/src/schemas/mcp_action_registry.rs`, which mirrors the live `MCP_ACTION_SPECS` dispatcher registry in `crates/axon-mcp/src/server/authz.rs` (read-only reference for this generator) — see `mcp_action_registry_tests.rs` for the drift guard against that registry.

## Actions

| Action | Scope | Mutates | Async | Request DTO | Grouped | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `help` | info | false | false | `HelpRequest` | false | List actions, subactions, defaults, and schema resource links |
| `status` | read | false | false | `StatusRequest` | false | Show unified jobs, watches, cleanup, totals, and service status |
| `jobs` | write | true | false | `JobsRequest` | true | List, inspect, page events, cancel, retry, recover, cleanup, or clear unified durable jobs |
| `doctor` | read | false | false | `DoctorRequest` | false | Diagnose Axon service connectivity |
| `source` | write | true | true | `SourceRequest` | false | Acquire and index one source (local path, git/web/feed/youtube/reddit/session/registry target) through the unified pipeline |
| `query` | read | false | false | `QueryRequest` | false | Run semantic vector search over indexed content |
| `retrieve` | read | false | false | `RetrieveRequest` | false | Fetch stored document chunks by URL |
| `resolve` | read | false | false | `ResolveRequest` | false | Resolve source identity and adapter route without acquiring content |
| `capabilities` | read | false | false | `CapabilitiesRequest` | false | Machine-readable server capability document: actions, scopes, providers |
| `providers` | read | false | false | `ProvidersRequest` | true | List or inspect provider capability/health |
| `search` | read | false | false | `SearchRequest` | false | Run SearXNG/Tavily web search and optionally queue Source jobs for results |
| `map` | read | false | false | `MapRequest` | false | Discover URLs for a site without scraping page content |
| `prune` | admin | true | false | `PruneMcpRequest` | true | Plan or execute source, generation, or collection cleanup behind axon-prune |
| `collections` | read | false | false | `CollectionsMcpRequest` | true | List or inspect configured vector collections |
| `reset` | admin | true | false | `ResetMcpRequest` | true | Plan or execute an explicit clean-slate store reset |
| `uploads` | write | true | false | `UploadsMcpRequest` | true | Stage, inspect, complete, list, or abort durable uploads |
| `ask` | read | false | false | `AskRequest` | false | Answer a question with RAG over indexed content |
| `evaluate` | read | false | false | `EvaluateRequest` | false | Evaluate RAG quality against a baseline and judge diagnostics |
| `suggest` | read | false | false | `SuggestRequest` | false | Suggest new documentation URLs to index |
| `research` | read | false | false | `ResearchRequest` | false | Run SearXNG/Tavily research with synthesis and auto-indexing |
| `screenshot` | write | true | false | `ScreenshotRequest` | false | Capture a full-page screenshot through headless Chrome |
| `brand` | write | true | false | `BrandRequest` | false | Extract brand identity metadata from a URL |
| `diff` | write | true | false | `DiffRequest` | false | Compare two URLs for content, metadata, and link changes |
| `extract` | write | true | true | `ExtractRequest` | true | Start async structured extraction jobs; use action=jobs for lifecycle |
| `memory` | write | true | false | `MemoryRequest` | true | Remember, search, and show persistent agent memory |
| `summarize` | read | false | false | `SummarizeRequest` | false | Fetch URL context and summarize it with the configured LLM |
| `endpoints` | write | true | false | `EndpointsRequest` | false | Discover and optionally verify static site endpoints |
| `watch` | write | true | false | `WatchRequest` | true | Create, list, inspect, execute, page history, update, pause, resume, or delete source-request-backed watches |
| `graph` | read | false | false | `GraphRequest` | true | Query the read-only SourceGraph: kinds, resolve, query, node, edge, source subgraph |

## Subactions

| Action | Subactions |
|---|---|
| `jobs` | `list`, `get`, `status`, `events`, `stream`, `cancel`, `retry`, `recover`, `cleanup`, `clear` |
| `providers` | `list`, `get` |
| `prune` | `plan`, `exec` |
| `collections` | `list`, `get` |
| `reset` | `plan`, `exec` |
| `uploads` | `list`, `create`, `get`, `put_content`, `complete`, `abort` |
| `extract` | `start` |
| `memory` | `remember`, `list`, `search`, `show`, `link`, `supersede`, `context`, `reinforce`, `contradict`, `pin`, `archive`, `forget`, `review`, `compact`, `import`, `export` |
| `watch` | `create`, `list`, `get`, `status`, `exec`, `history`, `update`, `pause`, `resume`, `delete` |
| `graph` | `kinds`, `resolve`, `query`, `node`, `edge`, `source` |

## Deferred Actions

Contract actions (`docs/pipeline-unification/schemas/mcp-tool-schema.md`'s target `Action` enum) absent from the live dispatcher. No request schema is fabricated for these — see `x-axon.deferred_actions` in the generated JSON schema.

| Action | Reason |
|---|---|
| `chat` | present in docs/pipeline-unification/schemas/mcp-tool-schema.md's target Action enum, absent from the live axon-mcp dispatcher (crates/axon-mcp/src/server.rs); no request DTO exists yet |
| `artifacts` | present in docs/pipeline-unification/schemas/mcp-tool-schema.md's target Action enum, absent from the live axon-mcp dispatcher (crates/axon-mcp/src/server.rs); no request DTO exists yet |

## Response Envelope

Every response uses `AxonToolResponse` (see `$defs.AxonToolResponse` in the generated JSON schema) — `ok`, `action`, `subaction`, `request_id`, `contract_version`, `data`, `warnings`, and optional `job`/`watch`/`artifacts`/`pagination`/`trace`.

## Drift Checks

Run `cargo xtask schemas mcp --check`. Registry parity against the real dispatcher is enforced separately by `xtask/src/schemas/mcp_action_registry_tests.rs` (`cargo test -p xtask`).
